title: YUEMING 6pc Stainless Steel Dessert Forks, Perfect for Cake, Fruit, Salad, Mini Cakes & More
features: 【High quality materials】 Fruit forks made of high quality stainless steel which is safe, durable and rust free., Reusable and easy to clean.
【Designed】 Ergonomic handle with rounded edges, exquisite workmanship, without any defects or bumps. The handle of the forks can be comfortably held in the hand, they are good for eating cake.

【Application】 Dessert forks are great for any occasion, such as wedding, birthday, cocktail party, banquet, catering, bar, restaurant and everyday use at home, etc., perfect for small desserts, antipasti, fruits, olives, cheese, salad vegetables, seafood, Mini cakes and more.
【Package】 6 colorful mini dessert forks. One for each color: black, blue, gold, red, dark green, purple. helps the user distinguish forks and avoid confusion.
【Easy to carry】 The 13 cm long fork can be placed in a lunch box or a cutlery bag, or taken to a campsite, school or workplace without taking up space. very suitable for at home or when traveling.

Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 94 4.4 out of 5 stars 94 Price £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £10.98 £ 10 . 98 Quantity 6PCS 8PCS Dessert Forks Stainless Steel Pastry Forks Set, Fruit Forks Mini Cake Forks for Home, Wedding, Party, Restaurant The set includes 6 pastry forks designed for small portions such as fruits, cheeses, vegetables, cherry tomatoes, and a variety of appetizers, as well as dessert pastries. Made of high-quality stainless steel, it has undergone multiple polishing treatments, it is as bright as a mirror, and the edges are well polished and sanded, which is very smooth, no burrs, and will not scratch the mouth; It can be paired with a variety of tableware for family gatherings, hotel buffets, weddings, festivals, parties and other occasions. This stainless steel pastry fork is suitable for family, wedding, restaurant, hotel, café, suitable for eating cakes, appetizers, fruits, etc. The pastry fork is non-toxic, BPA-free, and has no metallic aftertaste, so you can use it with confidence; Easy to store and clean, dishwasher safe. Specification: Material: stainless steel. Color: Black, Blue, Gold, Red, Dark Green, Pink Size: 13 * 2.2 cm Weight: 150 g Quantity: 6 pieces/8 6 pieces Multiple Uses This stainless steel pastry fork is suitable for home, wedding, restaurant, hotel, cafe, suitable for eating cakes, appetizers, fruits, etc. Pastry forks designed for small portions of food such as fruit, cheese, vegetables, olives, shrimp, cherry tomatoes, crab and a variety of appetizers as well as dessert pastries.
